title: SENTINEL APEX Zero-Day Advisory: SKIA
content:
Entity: SKIA
Alert Type: KEV Rapid Addition
Exploitation Status: CONFIRMED
Confidence: 0.95
Chain Evidence: kev_add
Recommended Actions:
  — CRITICAL: Patch or isolate systems affected by SKIA
  — IMMEDIATE: Assess exposure to SKIA
  — Deploy emergency detection rules (Sigma/YARA/Suricata)

  — Brief CISO on active exploitation risk
